action.reasoning: Observation: Best accuracy 81.68% achieved in iteration 17. Iteration 19 got 81.64% (slightly worse). Time remaining is ~37 seconds - not enough for any meaningful changes. Analysis: The ensemble approach with weighted model averaging + TTA + temperature scaling has been optimized. Further tweaks are unlikely to help in remaining time. Decision: End experiment with best result of 81.68%.
action.done_reason: Time budget nearly exhausted (~37 seconds remaining). Best accuracy achieved: 81.68% with weighted ensemble of ConvNeXt-Tiny models + TTA + temperature scaling. No further meaningful improvements possible in remaining time.
